name: Alexandra
subject: Fwd: Last night I put NSA spying on life support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Real quick, Fellow Conservative --

I know you're busy this holiday weekend, so I wanted to forward you Rand's email from yesterday in case you missed it.

On May 31st, you and I have a chance to END illegal NSA spying.

Check out Rand's email below for more information.

\-- Alexandra

* * *

Fellow Conservative:

What a week!

It all culminated last night around 1:30 AM when the U.S. Senate attempted to ram through legislation to keep the NSA's illegal domestic spy programs alive.

The first vote was on the House passed "reform" bill, which still allows bulk data collection under another method.

It failed, leaving spy-state apologists only one option - _to ram through some type of short-term extension of the unconstitutional "Patriot" Act_.

Fellow Conservative, I stood up to the surveillance state every step of way.

I refused to back down - objecting to EVERY short-term extension attempt made last night.

As a result, the Senate was forced to adjourn WITHOUT reauthorizing the "Patriot" Act - meaning the beast is set to expire on May 31st.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976195:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)

When the Senate comes back into session next Sunday, they'll have only 8 hours to pass a bill before the "Patriot" Act expires.

_That means if you and I can hold the spy state off for only 8 more hours, we'll relegate the NSA's illegal spy program to the trash bin of history where it belongs_.

But to do that I'm going to need your help throughout next week.

The truth is, this fight is extremely important to our future.

The Founders understood Liberty cannot long survive without privacy.

Most conservatives know government registration of firearms would ultimately lead to gun confiscation.

It's no different with the rest of our lives.

Once government bureaucrats know every aspect of our lives - what we watch, what we buy, what we eat, where we worship - it won't be long until they try to run them "for our own good."

_That's why it's critical you and I hold the spy state off for 8 more hours on May 31st_.

My staff is preparing a few videos of exactly what happened last night on the Senate floor.

As soon as they're uploaded and ready, I'll be sure to send them to you.

_Thanks to your support, you and I won a stunning victory this week. We proved if freedom-loving Americans stand and fight the Washington Machine - we can win_!

But I'm afraid our job is not over yet.

**[So I hope I can count on you to continue to stand with me in this fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976195:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976196:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976197:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976198:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976199:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976195:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)
In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976200:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976201:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27976202:26881630969:m:1:879035888:1B5A38C91E08A4E9CF8ACB659CF5A14A:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWO8PpD1NL). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWO8PpD1NL)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWO8PpD1NL) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-26881630969-echo3-D7D651DB796F816191737ADF12C9890F@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Mark
subject: FWD: from Governor Walker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
Peter, today is your last chance to claim your membership for 50%. Don't miss out on this- become a members today: **

Blue:** [Contribute: ~~$25~~ $12.50 or more >>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3MDYzNDgS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyMzgzNzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**White:** [Contribute ~~$150~~ $75 or more >>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3MDYzNDgS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyMzgzNzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Mark Stephenson

Begin forwarded message:
**From:** Scott Walker
**Subject:** Your Membership
**Date:** May 23, 2015
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3MDYzNDgS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyMzgzNzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
_**
**_
Peter,

Our finance staff just told me that you have not yet become a Charter Member of **Our American Revival**. As one of our key supporters, we would really appreciate your support.

**Account Information:**
Email Address: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Account Number:5806732
Link: [http://bit.ly/1GrZVf0?dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3MDYzNDgS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyMzgzNzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Your membership will assist us in our efforts to restore power back to the American taxpayer. With your help, we can return true accountability to Washington, DC and state capitals across our country.
[
BECOME A MEMBER NOW>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3MDYzNDgS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYyMzgzNzcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Scott Walker
